rationale: Documentation bug: incorrect default value for sslValidate in docs; no spec rule violated.
SyntaxError on import due to async generator syntax incompatibility with old Node.js runtime; build/compatibility issue.
Memory leak via session objects accumulating; implementation resource leak, no specific spec rule contradicted.
bson-ext incorrectly rejects $db, $ref, $id, $clusterTime keys; these are valid per BSON/OP_MSG spec.
bulk.execute() throws on zero operations; CRUD spec requires executing empty bulk op without error.
Updating transactions test runner to workaround a server bug; test infrastructure change, not driver behavior fix.
GridFSBucketReadStream doRead does not honor chunk size for range reads; GridFS spec defines chunk boundary behavior.
Silent connection failure intermittently on 3.0.8; timing/connectivity issue, no specific spec rule identified.
Test runner leaking connections between tests; internal test infrastructure quality issue, not spec behavior.
Unified topology receives undefined for pool size, collapsing to 1 connection; implementation bug without specific spec rule violated.
Performance degradation when scaling connection pool under load; perf/implementation issue, no spec rule.
Some connections hang indefinitely after primary failover; connectivity/pool behavior issue, no specific spec rule violated.
Client unable to progress after partition healed; network/reconnect implementation issue, no specific spec rule cited.
Oplog tailing stalls during failover; reconnect/cursor implementation issue, no specific spec rule.
MongoClient continues retrying after rejecting promise on first connect; implementation resource leak, no specific spec rule.
Unordered bulk writes incorrectly run batches in parallel while using same session; retryable writes spec requires serial session use.
Internal refactor moving operations to own classes; no behavior change or spec conformance issue.
Timestamp.MAX_VALUE uses Int32 max for high bits instead of UInt32 max; BSON Timestamp spec defines 64-bit unsigned integer semantics.
applyWriteConcern does not check for writeConcern property, so explicit write concern is dropped; write concern inheritance spec requires checking it.
insertOneWriteOpResult JSON.stringify returns only result sub-object; API ergonomics bug, no spec rule about toJSON serialization.
Internal refactor creating MongoNamespace class; no behavior or spec conformance change.
Read preference/write concern/read concern inheritance across MongoClient, Db, Collection must match spec inheritance rules.
Internal refactor of findAnd* to extend findAndModify; pure code restructuring, no behavior change.
Error type regression: MongoNetworkError not thrown on first connect failure; internal error wrapping issue, no spec rule about error types on first connect.
Reconnect event never fires for Mongos; internal event emission bug, no spec rule defines reconnect event.
TypeError accessing .message on undefined; implementation bug in error handling code, no spec rule.
ReadPreference accepts invalid mode values; server selection spec defines valid modes that must be enforced.
Same TypeError as NODE-1968; implementation crash on undefined error object, no spec rule.
appName with ':' parsed as tag set producing '[object Object]'; connection string spec defines appName as plain string.
findOneAndReplace silently accepts atomic operators; CRUD spec requires error 'replace doc must not contain atomic operators'.
Internal refactor to use new CommandOperation class; no behavior change or spec conformance issue.
Rename internal executeOperation function; pure internal refactor, no behavior change.
Connections not closed properly on Connection.close(); implementation/resource leak bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Removing superfluous dead code from ClientSession constructor; internal cleanup, no behavior change.
ChangeStream.close() fails to remove event listeners, causing memory leak; implementation resource leak, no spec rule on listener cleanup.
Test uses uncaughtException listener incorrectly; internal test code quality issue, not driver behavior.
Documentation page shows wrong version changelog; docs bug only.
Example code uses deprecated URL parser; docs/example code quality issue, no spec rule.
Incorrect expected value in a test assertion; test code bug, not driver behavior against a spec.
maxIdleTimeMS not supported in connection URI; CMAP/connection string spec defines maxIdleTimeMS as a valid option.
Request to document and support writeConcern in Collection.drop(); feature request/docs improvement, not a spec nonconformance.
startAtOperationTime and resumeToken both sent on resume; change streams spec says only one resume option allowed. Duplicate of JAVA-2987.
Db.createCollection does not pass readConcern to new collection; read/write concern spec requires collection inherits from parent db.
Internal refactor to make autoEncrypter more accessible; code cleanup, no behavior or spec conformance change.
Pool.reset() is a stub; SDAM and CMAP specs require pool reset in several scenarios, not yet implemented.
Refactoring readConcern test code to reduce boilerplate; internal test quality improvement, no driver behavior change.
Moving test runner dependencies into the driver repo; CI/test infrastructure reorganization, no spec behavior.
DRY refactor of collection_tests.js; internal test code cleanup, no driver behavior or spec change.
Node is Recovering errors not handled correctly per SDAM spec section 'Not Master and Node is Recovering'.
mongocryptd URI hardcoded; configuration/usability improvement, no spec rule violated.
